word: G4187 - πολυτρόπως - polytrópōs - pol-oot-rop'-oce - In divers manners

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: In divers manners
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adverb / வினையடை
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Adverb from a compound of G4183 and G5158; in many ways, that is, variously as to method or form: - in divers manners.
